headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -180.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 116% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 162 quotes at a massive 154.6 score, driven by an overwhelming 150 strong-intensity comments - people are extremely agitated today.

• This frustration level sits near the top of the 111-day range and doubled from yesterday's already elevated 76.1.

• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday's peak while optimism improved slightly but remains well below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
